If another pfanet owning 2 houses and occupying its star has its
sub period in the major period of the planet owing 3 houses, how to
read the result 1
Let me pose these questions and answer· Sun owns one house,
say second house. Venus owns 4 and 11: how do we read the result:
lord of 1 Oasa. lord of 4 sub period.
Lord of 1 Oasa, lord of 11 sub period. Suppose it Is Mercury Oasa
Venus Bhwkti. Mercury owns 2 and 11: Venus owns 3 and 10. Then lord
of 2 Dasa lord of 3 sub period.
Lord of 2 Oa.sa lord of 10 sub period.
Lord of 11 Oasa lord of 3 sub period.
Lord of 11 Dasa lord of 10 sub period.
Similar'ly take Mars Dasa saturn Bhukti in this chart. Mars owns the
houses S and 10. Saturn owns 7, 8 and 9 houses. At the time of
judgment one should analyse and read as follows:-
